inputs.label: Pressure (bar)
inputs.businessContext: Pressure value to convert from bar to psi.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pressure value to convert from bar to psi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Druckwert zur Umrechnung von bar in psi.

inputs.label: Reference Type
inputs.businessContext: 0 for absolute pressure, 1 for gauge pressure. If gauge, atmospheric pressure is added to obtain absolute pressure before conversion.

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for absolute pressure, 1 for gauge pressure. If gauge, atmospheric pressure is added to obtain absolute pressure before conversion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mutlak basınç için 0, gösterge basıncı için 1. Gösterge ise, dönüşümden önce mutlak basınç elde etmek için atmosfer basıncı eklenir.
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 für Absolutdruck, 1 für Relativdruck. Bei Relativdruck wird der Atmosphärendruck addiert, um den Absolutdruck vor der Umrechnung zu erhalten.

inputs.label: Atmospheric Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Standard atmospheric pressure at sea level. Used only when reference type is gauge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard atmospheric pressure at sea level. Used only when reference type is gauge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deniz seviyesinde standart atmosfer basıncı. Yalnızca referans türü gösterge olduğunda kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Atmosphärendruck auf Meereshöhe. Wird nur verwendet, wenn der Bezugstyp Relativdruck ist.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the converted psi value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the converted psi value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüştürülen psi değeri için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für den umgerechneten psi-Wert.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Custom conversion factor (default is 1 bar = 14.503773773 psi). Modify only if a different definition is required.

businessContext_i18n.en: Custom conversion factor (default is 1 bar = 14.503773773 psi). Modify only if a different definition is required.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Özel dönüşüm faktörü (varsayılan 1 bar = 14.503773773 psi). Yalnızca farklı bir tanım gerekiyorsa değiştirin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Benutzerdefinierter Umrechnungsfaktor (Standard: 1 bar = 14,503773773 psi). Nur ändern, wenn eine andere Definition erforderlich ist.

inputs.label: Measurement Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Ambient temperature at the measurement point (for documentation only, does not affect the conversion).

businessContext_i18n.en: Ambient temperature at the measurement point (for documentation only, does not affect the conversion).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm noktasındaki ortam sıcaklığı (yalnızca dokümantasyon için, dönüşümü etkilemez).
businessContext_i18n.de: Umgebungstemperatur am Messpunkt (nur zur Dokumentation, beeinflusst die Umrechnung nicht).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
